title: EmailOctopus vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: EmailOctopus vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between EmailOctopus and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. EmailOctopus is built for budget-conscious creators and small businesses, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. EmailOctopus wins for budget-conscious creators and small businesses, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, EmailOctopus or Customer.io?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to EmailOctopus?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
